famous quote:
"Spiteful words can hurt your feelings but silence breaks your heart."
-- C.S. Lewis
Interview Text:
Samuel G.

(part 4)

I tell Samuel that in Ethiopia I heard stories of lots of healing, and I ask him if maybe here in America God wants to move by giving us words of knowledge to share with people instead of healing them physically. 

Samuel says, "I think it's both. Some people say it was just the 12 disciples who could heal. Well, in Luke Jesus tells the 72 apostles to go heal people. It's not just the apostles who could heal. It's all of us.

"Over the past year I've seen 50 people healed." About a year and a half ago he had a shift in his thinking. He says, "Look at the Lord's prayer. It says 'Let your kingdom come on earth as it is in heaven.' So I started asking myself not 'God, will you heal,' but instead, 'is this of the kingdom of heaven?' And if it isn't, I just command the sickness to go away."
Music Video Instructions: Picture this being how God loves us, and how we can love him.
